description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric layout. The structure features white exterior walls, large windows, and multiple open spaces, including a backyard with a blue swimming pool and a wooden deck. There is a pergola-covered patio area adjacent to the pool, and a small green lawn section. The house includes several rooms arranged around a central living space, with visible interior furnishings and open passageways. The main entryway is understated, with a simple door and minimal steps, blending seamlessly into the facade. The overall design emphasizes open-plan living, outdoor connectivity, and contemporary architectural elements.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, white walls, large windows, a backyard pool, and a pergola patio. The layout is open and geometric, with visible interior and exterior living spaces.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from the front, highlighting the main entryway, central living area, and a glimpse of the backyard pool and pergola.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the house from the side, emphasizing the long, linear layout, large windows, and the green lawn area.
description_view_2: View 2 focuses on the backyard, showcasing the blue swimming pool, wooden deck, and pergola-covered patio.
description_view_3: View 3 displays the opposite side, revealing the pool, patio, and additional green space, as well as the rear rooms of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with minimal steps, no porch, and a clean, integrated facade
